majoumonogatari-sts2mods.cecily.title: Cecily
majoumonogatari-sts2mods.cecily.descript: A half-witch born with a talent for manipulating tiny air currents. She was accidentally teleported into the Spire by a friend's experiment.
majoumonogatari-sts2mods.cecily.cardsMod: Cecily cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
